wife: I checked the lint trap. It looked... historical.
Your mother-in-law texted a thumbs-up. I don't like the confidence in it.
dryer: The dryer hums with the quiet menace of a household appliance outside warranty.
A warm draft slips through the vent like a prophecy.
battleIntro: The Evil Heating Coil emerges from behind the dryer.
basementIntro: Somewhere in the utility gloom, the dryer vent rattles like a cursed kazoo.
basementExit: You climb back toward the living room and its many unresolved expectations.
victory: The dryer coughs once, then resumes its sacred duty.
Temporary suburban order has been restored.
